  (headeye_encoder): HiddenLSTM(
    (lstm): LSTM(1, 85, num_layers=2, batch_first=True)
  )
  (pod_encoder): HiddenLSTM(
    (lstm): LSTM(2, 90, num_layers=3, batch_first=True)
  )
  (hidden_dense): HiddenDense(
    (fc1): Linear(in_features=316, out_features=217, bias=True)
  )
  (output_dense): OutputDense(
    (fc): Linear(in_features=217, out_features=200, bias=True)
  )
)
